chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2895 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15309/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at Flag ‘’A’’ 3. For orders on M.A. No.15310/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.10.2025 Ms. Erum Riaz Ahmed, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Muhammad Hamid son of Munshi Khan seeks protective bail in FIR No.192/2009 under Section-302, 34 PPC, registered at P.S Shah Faisal Colony. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated with malafide intention; that prior to this bail application, the applicant has filed bail application No.585/2025 and this Court granted protective bail for four days vide order dated 07.03.2025 but he could not surrender before the trial Court for want of surety. Now he wishes to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his arrest as the trial Court issued NBWs, therefore, the NBWs issued by the trial Court may also be suspended, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today i.e 22.10.2025 to 28.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Now he wishes to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his arrest as the trial Court issued NBWs, therefore, the NBWs issued by the trial Court may also be suspended, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today i.e 22.10.2025 to 28.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. In the meanwhile, operation of the NBWs issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 07 days period i.e. 28.10.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
